# oma docs

> Open-source alternative to Claude Managed Agents — self-host Claude agents on Cloudflare or Docker. Docs for the OMA platform: concepts, architecture, REST API, CLI/SDK, and deploy guides.

OMA is a meta-harness: the platform prepares *what* an agent has (tools,
skills, history, sandbox, credentials); a harness decides *how* to drive the
model loop. The same business logic runs on Cloudflare Workers + Durable
Objects or self-hosted via `docker compose`. Drop-in compatible with the
Claude Managed Agents API.

## Get Started

- [Welcome](https://docs.oma.duyet.net/)
- [Quickstart](https://docs.oma.duyet.net/quickstart/)
- [Concepts](https://docs.oma.duyet.net/concepts/): agent, session, environment, vault
- [Architecture](https://docs.oma.duyet.net/architecture/): the meta-harness model
- [How it works & the hard parts](https://docs.oma.duyet.net/how-it-works/)

## Use the Console

- [Getting Started](https://docs.oma.duyet.net/console/getting-started/)
- [Connect Integrations](https://docs.oma.duyet.net/console/integrations/)

- [Custom Integrations](https://docs.oma.duyet.net/build/integrations/)

- [Overview](https://docs.oma.duyet.net/self-host/overview/)

- [OAuth Apps](https://docs.oma.duyet.net/self-host/oauth-apps/)
- [Operations](https://docs.oma.duyet.net/self-host/operations/)
